creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
It’s time to plan your trip to Dubai Safari Park ⤵️

Dubai Safari Park is a 119-hectare wildlife facility with 4 main villages to explore and see animals up close!

🎟️ Prices per adult:
Safari Park Pass: AED 50
Safari Park Pass with train: AED 75
Safari Bundle: AED 125
Please check inclusions at Dubai Safari website. 

🕘 9:00 AM to 5 PM daily 
Tip: Be there early! The park is huge and there are so many activities in store! Our 3 hours visit was not enough to explore all 4 zones. But at least, we were able to go on a 30-minute Safari Tour at the Explorer Village which is the park’s highlight! 

🚊 How to get there by public transportation:
Take the Red Line train to Centerpoint. Ride the RTA bus F10 to Dubai Safari Park.
Please check RTA website for timings.

Tag your family and friends!

transcription.text: Birds are singing, la-da-da-da-da-dee Yesterday is dead to me I feel the ground beneath my feet When I say, ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh Don't go killing all my roses Cause I've only started growing
